title: Dutch HNWI Signal Engine — Input
description: AFM MAR 19 HTML register scraper with optional Exa shortlist confirmation. Scrapes paginated HTML pages from the AFM MAR 19 register, scores and filters signals, and writes outputs to Apify datasets and KV store.

dateFrom.title: Date from (dd-mm-yyyy)
dateFrom.description: Start date filter for the AFM MAR 19 register in dd-mm-yyyy format. Leave blank to default to 30 days ago.

maxPages.title: Max pages to scrape
maxPages.description: Maximum number of HTML pages to scrape from the AFM register. Each page contains a table of transaction filings. Pagination stops when no more results are found or this limit is reached.

runExaConfirmation.title: Run Exa confirmation
runExaConfirmation.description: Enable the optional Exa neural search confirmation pass. When enabled, the top review records (bucket A + top N bucket B) are enriched with Exa web search results to confirm person context, role, and disposal language. Requires exaApiKey or EXA_API_KEY environment variable.

minSignalConfidence.title: Minimum signal confidence gate
minSignalConfidence.description: Records with signal_confidence below this threshold are blocked by the 'below_min_signal_confidence' gate and do not reach shortlist. Default 0.6.

minNaturalPersonConfidence.title: Minimum natural person confidence gate
minNaturalPersonConfidence.description: Records with natural_person_confidence below this threshold are blocked. Default 0.6.

minReviewPriorityScore.title: Minimum review priority score
minReviewPriorityScore.description: Minimum review priority score for shortlist eligibility. Default 0.4.

excludeInstitutions.title: Exclude institutional records from exports
excludeInstitutions.description: When true, records flagged as high institutional risk are removed from all exports after scoring.

maxReviewRecords.title: Max review dataset records
maxReviewRecords.description: Maximum number of records written to the 'review' named dataset.

maxShortlistRecords.title: Max shortlist dataset records
maxShortlistRecords.description: Maximum number of records written to the default dataset (shortlist). The shortlist uses a softer gate: requires review bucket A or B, natural_person_confidence >= 0.45, and signal_confidence >= 0.40.

topBucketBForExa.title: Bucket B records for Exa confirmation
topBucketBForExa.description: How many bucket B review records to include in the Exa confirmation pass (in addition to all bucket A records). Only relevant when runExaConfirmation is true.

exaFreshnessMaxAgeHours.title: Exa content freshness cap (hours)
exaFreshnessMaxAgeHours.description: Maximum age in hours for Exa content fetches during confirmation. Default 72 hours.

exaApiKey.title: Exa API key
exaApiKey.description: Optional. Secret Exa API key. If left empty, the actor will fall back to EXA_API_KEY from the environment.

debug.title: Debug logging
debug.description: Enable verbose debug logging. Produces additional structured log entries for each pipeline stage.
